name: 田子坊每日客流报告
description: Every day at 02:00 Asia/Shanghai: build yesterday measured-only Tianzifang crowd report from Neon and store it back to Neon.

parameters.jsCode:
return [{ json: { query: "WITH params AS (
  SELECT ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date - interval '1 day')::date AS report_date
), samples AS (
  SELECT value, ts, confidence, raw_json
  FROM crowd_data, params
  WHERE source = 'gov_tour'
    AND metric = 'in_park_count'
    AND confidence = 'measured'
    AND ts >= (params.report_date::text || 'T00:00:00+08:00')::timestamptz
    AND ts < ((params.report_date + interval '1 day')::date::text || 'T00:00:00+08:00')::timestamptz
    AND value IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY ts
), holiday AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'is_holiday' THEN value END) AS is_holiday,
    MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'is_holiday' THEN raw_json END) AS holiday_raw,
    MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'weekday' THEN value END) AS weekday
  FROM crowd_data, params
  WHERE source = 'holiday'
    AND ts >= (params.report_date::text || 'T00:00:00+08:00')::timestamptz
    AND ts < ((params.report_date + interval '1 day')::date::text || 'T00:00:00+08:00')::timestamptz
)
SELECT
  params.report_date::text AS date,
  COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('value', samples.value, 'ts', samples.ts, 'confidence', samples.confidence, 'raw_json', samples.raw_json) ORDER BY samples.ts) FILTER (WHERE samples.value IS NOT NULL), '[]'::json) AS samples,
  COALESCE(MAX(holiday.is_holiday), 0) AS is_holiday,
  MAX(holiday.holiday_raw) AS holiday_raw,
  MAX(holiday.weekday) AS holiday_weekday
FROM params
LEFT JOIN samples ON true
LEFT JOIN holiday ON true
GROUP BY params.report_date;" } }];

const items = $input.all();
return [{ json: { status: 'ok', wrote: items.length, finished_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];
